calendar.matters:
Petition Supplement To First And Final Report Of Successor Personal Representative, Petition For Settlement And For Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Text Ruling

Petition Supplement To First And Final Report Of Successor Personal Representative, Petition For Settlement And For Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng (Administrator) in Propria Persona. Gregory O'Keeffe for Alfred Garibaldi.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that his Client is adament in his position that he is entitled to statutory fees. Ms. Ng explained work she performed and argued that statutory fees for Alfred Garibaldi are not appropriate. The Petition to First and Final Report of Successor Personal Representative, etc. was continued to January 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Alfred Garibaldi to file time sheets/a declaration regarding hours by January 25, 2013. If there is no appearance by anyone on January 29th, the matter will deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition Supplement To First And Final Report Of Successor Personal Representative, Petition For Settlement And For Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng Administrator for the Estate of William Garibaldi. Gregory O'Keeffe for Alfred Garibaldi (Successor Personal Representative).

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that his Client is still adamant in his position with regard to the statutory fees. Ms. Ng argued that Alfred did not manage the property and is not entitled to fees. Counsel advised the Court that the tax returns are completed. The Court stated that it was inclined to deny the petition outright or continue the matter for filing of an amended petition asking for exrtaordinary fees. The Supplement to the First and Final Report, etc. was continued to January 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. O'Keeffe the opportunity to amend the petition if his Client chooses to do so.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
